news.headline: US small businesses hoping for World Cup bonanza
news.summary: As football fans prepare to descend on North America for the 2026 World Cup, US small businesses are gearing up to receive them - and hopefully, score some extra revenue. With more than five million visitors expected to visit the US, shops are expecting a surge in customers - even in smaller markets
